plan4_hold_reason: Four blocking fixes required: Rust extension (memory injection), SelfImprovementRegistry persistence, real model coding pipeline, Jarvis-native skills registration
executive_verdict: HOLD — multiple fake-complete findings. Memory injection broken (Rust unavailable). Self-improvement has no persistence. Coding pipeline defaults to mock. Company org executor is scaffold. Jarvis-native skill registry empty.

capabilities.name: ECC Catalog — Guidance Items (286)
capabilities.actual_evidence: Catalog API returns guidance text. MIT. No external APIs. No execution.

capabilities.name: ECC Catalog — Executable Items (33)
capabilities.actual_evidence: 33 items have ui_route pointing to Jarvis-native skill implementations

capabilities.name: Memory Context Injection — Server Path
capabilities.actual_evidence: SQLiteMemory.__init__() raises MemoryBackendUnavailable because openjarvis_rust not compiled. RUST_AVAILABLE=False. serve.py catches exception silently. app.state.memory_backend = None always.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: openjarvis_rust Rust extension not compiled into venv
capabilities.corrective_action: uv run maturin develop -m rust/crates/openjarvis-python/Cargo.toml (needs rustc >= 1.88)

capabilities.name: JarvisMemory — Pure Python SQLite
capabilities.actual_evidence: JarvisMemory write/search confirmed working via uv run test. ~/.jarvis/memory.db file-backed.
capabilities.invocation_path: Direct API import; tools/catalog.py memory.write tool
capabilities.missing_structural_link: Not connected to server injection path (that uses SQLiteMemory, not JarvisMemory)
capabilities.corrective_action: Wire JarvisMemory into serve.py as fallback when Rust unavailable, OR compile Rust extension

capabilities.name: SelfImprovementRegistry
capabilities.actual_evidence: All storage is plain Python dict. No sqlite3 import. No file I/O. Process restart erases all learned state.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: No persistence backend — flaws/plans/routing memory lost on restart
capabilities.corrective_action: Add SQLite or JSON-file persistence to SelfImprovementRegistry. Write on record_flaw(), load on init.

capabilities.name: CodingPipeline — Default (Mock)
capabilities.actual_evidence: JARVIS_MODEL_ADAPTER defaults to 'mock'. MockModelAdapter returns '[MOCK:{model}] Task acknowledged. Dry-run response.' Server route uses dry_run=True.
capabilities.invocation_path: jarvis code: prefix or natural intent → server routes.py
capabilities.corrective_action: Set JARVIS_OPENROUTER_KEY in .env. Change server route to dry_run=False when key present. Produce live run evidence.

capabilities.name: CodingPipeline — Real (with JARVIS_OPENROUTER_KEY)
capabilities.actual_evidence: OpenRouterWorker and OllamaWorker fully implemented. Pipeline structure (classify→plan→inspect→patch→validate→review→checkpoint) is real.
capabilities.corrective_action: Set JARVIS_OPENROUTER_KEY, run live coding task, capture real diff output as evidence

capabilities.name: JarvisFrontDoor + CosGmOrchestrator
capabilities.actual_evidence: Full routing architecture wired. Blocked actions enforced. Runtime trace events emit.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: Workers dispatch in dry-run only; real execution requires per-action Bryan authorization
capabilities.corrective_action: Define and document authorization path for real task-scoped execution

capabilities.name: Company Org Default Worker Executor
capabilities.actual_evidence: _default_local_executor returns static dict with /tmp/jarvis_artifacts/... path. No execution. No tool dispatch.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: No ToolExecutionGateway dispatch in default executor
capabilities.corrective_action: Wire ToolExecutionGateway into worker executor; or document as dry-run scaffold

capabilities.name: Jarvis-Native Skill Registry (system prompt)
capabilities.actual_evidence: SystemPromptBuilder returns <available_skills>\n</available_skills> (empty). test_skill_catalog_in_system_prompt fails. code-explainer skill does not exist.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: ECC guidance skills not injected into SkillRegistry; Jarvis-native skills not registered
capabilities.corrective_action: Register ECC skills or create Jarvis-native skills (research-and-summarize, code-explainer, etc.) in SkillRegistry

capabilities.name: Voice Pipeline
capabilities.actual_evidence: is_listening=False always. Wake word BLOCKED (onnxruntime/macOS incompatibility). No two-turn loop. Status-reporting only.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: Two-turn STT/TTS loop; packaged-app mic proof; wake word engine

capabilities.name: Tauri Packaged App
capabilities.actual_evidence: OpenJarvis_1.0.2_x64.dmg built. OpenJarvis.app runs locally. Signature=adhoc, TeamIdentifier=not set.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: Apple Developer Program enrollment + notarization for distribution
capabilities.corrective_action: Enroll in Apple Developer Program ($99/yr), notarize build for distribution

capabilities.name: Governance Hard Gates
capabilities.actual_evidence: HARD_GATE_ACTIONS defined in constitution.py. Enforced in frontdoor.py, cos_gm.py, worker_adapters.py, intelligence/trust.py.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: GuardrailsEngine not auto-applied in main serve path
capabilities.corrective_action: Wire GuardrailsEngine into serve.py; add guardrails tests

capabilities.name: GuardrailsEngine (Security Scanning)
capabilities.actual_evidence: Class fully implemented. Not wired into serve.py engine path. Only agent_manager_routes.py has a comment about it.
capabilities.missing_structural_link: Not wired into serve.py main engine construction
capabilities.corrective_action: Add GuardrailsEngine wrapping in serve.py when security scanning desired

fake_complete_findings.illusion: SQLiteMemory raises MemoryBackendUnavailable (openjarvis_rust missing). serve.py swallows exception. memory_backend=None always.
All storage in Python dict. No file I/O. No SQLite. All state lost on process restart.
JARVIS_MODEL_ADAPTER defaults to 'mock'. MockModelAdapter returns fake response string. Server uses dry_run=True.

fake_complete_findings.claim: CompanyOrgRuntime executes the actual local pipeline
fake_complete_findings.illusion: _default_local_executor returns static dict with fake /tmp/jarvis_artifacts/... path. No execution.

fake_complete_findings.claim: Skills available in chat system prompt
fake_complete_findings.illusion: SystemPromptBuilder returns empty <available_skills>. code-explainer and research-and-summarize don't exist. 4 live integration tests fail.
Class implemented but not wired into serve.py main path.

orphaned_unactivated_findings.reason: Needs OPENAI_API_KEY for embeddings. Not activated in any primary flow.
record_routing_decision() exists. get_routing_memory() never called before task dispatch.
Multiple pass exception handlers. Not connected to main chat flow.
Multiple platform files not called from any primary entry point.

corrective_sprints.description: Set JARVIS_OPENROUTER_KEY in .env, change server route to dry_run=False when key present
Register Jarvis-native skills in SkillRegistry (expose in system prompt)
Wire GuardrailsEngine into serve.py engine path
Add memory retrieval before task dispatch in CompanyOrgRuntime.run()
Voice sprint — two-turn STT/TTS loop with packaged app proof

validation_commands.command: uv run python3 -c "from openjarvis._rust_bridge import RUST_AVAILABLE; print(RUST_AVAILABLE)"
uv run python3 -c "from openjarvis.memory.store import JarvisMemory; m = JarvisMemory(); m.write('global', 'test'); results = m.search('test'); print(len(results))"
uv run python3 -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_catalog import ECCCatalog; c = ECCCatalog(); all_items = c.list_all(); active = [i for i in all_items if i.get('state') == 'active']; print(len(active))"

plan4_gate.rationale: Memory injection broken, self-learning not durable, coding pipeline defaults to mock, default worker executor is scaffold, Jarvis-native skills not registered in system prompt. All five blockers require concrete code changes and live evidence before Plan 4 can start.
